overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a commercial district in Night City during golden hour. The player character walks along sidewalks past neon-signed storefronts, palm trees, and futuristic structures, transitioning from a quiet street section to a busier area with a large circular billboard and transit station.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to commercial buildings, approaching an intersection

wooden utility poles with transformers and power lines
beige concrete commercial building with graffiti
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in a commercial district. A billboard with a cartoon character is visible on the left building, while utility poles and power lines run parallel to the street. Palm trees and mountainous terrain are visible in the distance under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with adult entertainment storefront

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the opposite sidewalk past pedestrians

entered.detail: corner building with prominent red neon lips sign and 18+ signage
large red neon sign shaped like lips above the entrance
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and approaches a corner building featuring prominent neon signage including red lips and 18+ symbols. The sidewalk features graffiti-covered walls, and a few pedestrians are visible walking along the street. The camera turns slightly to follow the sidewalk curve.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busier sidewalk section, the camera passes a tent encampment on the right and various pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. A massive futuristic skyscraper rises in the background to the left, contrasting with the low-rise commercial buildings. The street features more foot traffic and urban decay elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station area with large circular billboard

events.description: approaching the large circular rotating billboard structure and transit kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large circular billboard structure and transit station area

green and red transit ticket machines and vendor stalls
row of colorful vending machines along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a distinctive large circular rotating billboard that dominates the intersection. The area features transit station kiosks and vending machines on the left, with the camera moving toward this landmark structure. The environment opens up to show more of the futuristic city infrastructure and distant commercial buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a commercial district that evolves from a quiet street into a dense, futuristic urban intersection. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk past a cartoon billboard and utility poles, with distant mountains visible under a clear afternoon sky. As the camera crosses the street, the environment shifts toward a more gritty atmosphere featuring graffiti-covered walls and neon signage of red lips and 18+ symbols. The scene then expands into a busier pedestrian area, passing a tent encampment and low-rise shops while a massive skyscraper looms in the background. Finally, the camera moves toward a large, rotating circular billboard at a transit hub, where the view opens up to reveal the full scale of the city's futuristic infrastructure.
